baseline.observed: The recommendation panel rendered the last improvement result without tracking which prompt produced it, so selection changes caused by filtering could leave a stale recommendation visible.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because src/improvementSelection.ts did not exist.

change.summary: Added activeImprovementForSelection, tracked improvementPromptId, and rendered recommendation content only when it matches the current selected prompt.

verification.result: PASS: 9 Node UI helper tests passed.
PASS: 9 UI helper tests, Vite build, 31 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.

safety_controls: No new npm dependency was added.
Recommendations are preserved when the same prompt remains selected.
Stale recommendations are hidden when the selected prompt changes.
